description: Application logs: hoist MDC fields, normalise log level

script.source: if (ctx.mdc != null) { if (ctx.mdc.tenantId != null) ctx.tenantId = ctx.mdc.tenantId; if (ctx.mdc.customerId != null) ctx.customerId = ctx.mdc.customerId; if (ctx.mdc.correlationId != null) ctx.correlationId = ctx.mdc.correlationId; }
